title: Razer Kiyo V2 X Review: Auto-focus for life
summary: Razer Kiyo V2 X is a budget-friendly webcam offering 1440p / 60 fps video, auto-focus, and an 80-degree field of view with a physical privacy shutter.
insight: Cost-effective solution for high-quality video streaming and conferencing.

title: Hardcore SpongeBob speedrunners smudged Xbox optical disks with sweat and grease to exploit 'lag clip' trick filthy smeared disks cut gameplay times in ultimate pursuit of speed
summary: Speedrunners discovered that a grease smear on Xbox optical disks can help them save time in SpongeBob SquarePants: Battle for Bikini Bottom by exploiting a quirk in the game's disc reading system, known as the 'lag clip' trick.
insight: Speedrun optimization relies on unexpected hardware interactions.

title: Save $500 on this beastly gaming rig with an RTX 5060 Ti 16GB, Ryzen 7800X3D, and 32GB of RAM Skytech's desktop gaming PC now just $1,499
summary: Get a premium gaming PC with 1440p capabilities and upgrade path for $1,499.
insight: Budget-friendly high-performance gaming PC for 1440p enthusiasts available again.

title: More than 75 data center build-outs worth $130 billion have been successfully blocked in the first three months of 2026 bipartisan opposition mounts nationwide over fears of soaring power and water costs
summary: Bipartisan opposition blocks over 75 data center build-outs worth $130 billion in Q1 2026. The number of blocked projects matches last year's total. President Trump's push for AI development faces opposition nationwide.
insight: Soaring power and water costs fuel bipartisan data center opposition

title: AMD challenges Nvidia's DGX Spark with $3,999 Ryzen AI Halo with Windows 11 support Strix Halo desktop undercuts Nvidia by $700, packs 128GB of unified memory
summary: AMD's Ryzen AI Halo desktop competes with Nvidia's DGX Spark, priced at $3,999. It features the Ryzen AI Max+ 395 processor and 128GB of unified memory. This kit supports Windows 11.
insight: AMD undercuts Nvidia by $700 with a powerful AI developer kit.

title: Netgear countersues TP-Link, saying firm 'remains, at its core, a Chinese company selling Chinese-made products' alleges its 'American company' rebrand is false advertising
summary: Netgear countersues TP-Link, accusing it of false advertising as 'American company'.
insight: Rival companies clash over authenticity and national branding claims.

title: Nvidia raises RTX Pro 6000 Blackwell GPU pricing to $13,250 55% increase over MSRP in a year's time
summary: Nvidia increases RTX Pro 6000 Blackwell GPU pricing by 55% within a year.
insight: Massive price hike makes high-end GPUs inaccessible to many consumers.

title: AI costs spike as subscriptions hit pricing wall firms turn towards Chinese LLMs, open-source models to extend budget
summary: Companies turn to cheaper alternatives as AI model costs spike, threatening profitability.
insight: High utilization rates can lead to significant AI cost losses.

title: Intel reportedly preparing surprise return to DDR4 systems with 'Raptor Lake Next' LGA 1700 platform apparently slated for first half of 2027, takes a page from AMD's book by extending budget platform longevity
summary: Intel reportedly preparing to revive DDR4 systems with 'Raptor Lake Next' platform.
insight: Intel extends budget platform longevity mimicking AMD's success strategy.

title: U.S. gov't orders Anthropic to disable its newest AI models worldwide due to security threats ban on Claude Fable 5 and Mythos 5 bars access by any foreign national, even its own employees
summary: Anthropic disabled its AI models, Claude Fable 5 and Mythos 5, worldwide due to a U.S. government order citing security threats. The ban restricts access to these models by any foreign national, including the company's own employees. This move is intended to prevent potential misuse.
insight: US government prioritizes national security over AI model accessibility

title: Creality Sermoon S1 review Part 3: 3D scanning with Khadas Mind 2 and NVIDIA GeForce RTX 5060 Ti 16GB dock
summary: This review continues the Creality Sermoon S1 3D scanner assessment with a more capable setup featuring the Khadas Mind 2 mini PC and NVIDIA GeForce RTX 5060 Ti graphics dock, showcasing improved performance and capabilities.
insight: NVIDIA GPU significantly boosts 3D scanner performance and functionality

title: Microsoft's shader stutter fix is now available for all AMD Radeon GPUs, Nvidia users have to wait
summary: Microsoft's shader stutter fix is available for all AMD Radeon GPUs, improving gaming performance. The feature virtually eliminates shader compilation in PC games played through the Xbox app. It currently only supports AMD Radeon graphics cards.
insight: Shader stutter fix enhances gaming performance for AMD Radeon users.

title: Microsoft president says AI backlash at graduation events should be wake-up call for the tech industry
summary: Microsoft president Brad Smith urges industry leaders to heed growing AI backlash, citing concerns about AI speakers at graduation events.
insight: Industry should listen to public concerns about AI's impact and ethics.

title: Justice Department seizes websites that published deepfake nudes of famous women
summary: The US Justice Department seized websites publishing deepfake nudes without consent, hosting thousands of digital forgeries.
insight: Non-consensual deepfakes have severe consequences for victims' reputations and mental health.

title: Microsoft may consider Xbox spin-off or joint venture as console business struggles
summary: Microsoft executives consider restructuring Xbox as subsidiary or joint venture due to business struggles.
insight: Xbox's future uncertain as Microsoft explores new ownership structures.
